+Prototype

The **Prototype Horizon** is one of the most valuable items in the game. It is a limited character duplicate selector, allowing you to choose a free duplicate (Enlightenment level) for any limited SSR Awakener character you already own. 

Timeloop is a similar item but for limited wheel duplicate selector instead.

You can purchase these monthly from the in-game "Sediment Exchange" Store using a currency called Sediment, which is primarily obtained from doing gacha pulls.

+guides

Please be sure to check out our <#1304022827824844842>  section! Here are a few resources, tips, and walkthroughs to help you master the game:
## General Guide
- [Morimens New Players Handbook](<https://docs.google.com/document/d/1THjxR9hHs4NWHqSWHHa2dHAGuE_cRGelfzXdBfCnIlM/edit?usp=sharing>) by Cheri
- [Game Mechanics](https://discordapp.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1417994340177022981) by Mythag University
- [Store Guide](https://discordapp.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1442292634575175710) by Mythag University 
- [Morimens Database and Teambuiler](https://skeydb.com/#/database) by Fjant
## Mode Specific
- [P-Dive Shortest Map Analysis](<https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1483756178340315216>) by Aurora
## Compendium
- [Morimens Compendium](<https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1TCU7LJRzqKeuvLe97y_TfGZ-j6jq5bZX6hskAAJ2mFQ/edit?gid=167686509#gid=167686509>) by Mythag University
- [Boss Compendium](https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1489244885025292328) by Mythag University

+list

Hello, these are the list of available commands.

+New - Beginner guide and Codes thread
+Guides - common guides 
+Codes - codes
+Cov - Covenant guide
+Lore - lore
+Prototype - Prototype Horizon and Timeloop copy explanation
+Echo - echoing wishes banner
+Damage - damage formula
+Saya - Saya banner and event release
+Dtide - Dtide guide
+Char - Character guides
+Catraid - Cat raid
+Support - Borrowing a whaled support
+Ethereal - Ethereal core explanation 
+Pyramid - Origin of time explanation 
+Banner - Banner overview and Pack value
